Defendant Sun Link Corporation'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Further Responses To Request For Production (Set One), And Special Interrogatories (Set One)
Off Calendar Jan-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and Defendant Sun Link Corporation'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Further Responses To Request For Production (Set One), And Special Interrogatories (Set One) is taken off calendar. Case has settled. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
